address.address1: NA, Lampriek, Bandar Baru, Kuta Alam, Banda Aceh, Indonesia, Banda Aceh

description.short: Boutique stay steps from historic Masjid Oman Al‑Makmur and local markets, perfect for two travelers. Acehnese‑themed décor, rooftop city views, and a cozy communal lounge for relaxing. Near Baiturrahman Grand Mosque, tsunami memorials and seafood markets, this hotel is a practical base for two travelers exploring culture and cuisine. Services: 24‑hour front desk, room service, daily housekeeping and secure luggage storage. Rooms include air conditioning, complimentary Wi‑Fi and refreshing showers with plush towels; select higher-floor rooms offer city views. Quiet communal areas and a rooftop provide space to plan outings, relax after market visits or stream entertainment with reliable connectivity. [Some content may be Generative AI assisted. Inaccuracies may occur.]

comments.reviewComments: My experience staying for 2 nights at Hotel O near the Oman B. Aceh mosque was extraordinary. The service was excellent. comments.reviewComments: I didn't expect that with a price below 100,000, I could get such a comfortable hotel. Just 150,000 for 2 nights. A little cautious before checking in 😄 Turns out it's really good. The hotel is clean, not in a noisy area but still close to everything. Specifically, it's near the Oman mosque. The facilities include AC, a private bathroom, TV, wifi, toiletries, and a prayer mat. There's a closet, table, and drawer. Water supply is smooth. The hotel staff is also friendly. Overall, the cheapest price in Banda Aceh is really satisfying! 👍
comments.originalComment:
Gak nyangka sih dengan harga  dbawah 100 ribu dapat hotel nyaman begini
2 malam cuma 150rb
Sedikit was2 sebelum chekin 😄
Ternyata lumanyan banget
Hotel bersih,bukan ditempat bising tpi masih dekat kemana2
Tepat nya dekat mesjid oman
Vasilitas udah dapat ac,kamar mandi pribadi,tv,wifi,peralatan mandi,sajadah
Ada lemari,meja,laci,
Air lancar..
Orang hotel nya juga ramah,
Pokok nya hrga termurah sebanda aceh udah memuaskan banget ini 👍

comments.reviewComments: If you want a cheap hotel with complete facilities, then this hotel is the choice. Booking through the app is cheaper because you can get a discount, sometimes below ***, but the room given is on the 3rd floor, and there is no lift. The water supply is very minimal, it comes out little by little and often shuts off; cleanliness is also lacking. Although with that price, I might not demand more, except for the bathroom water, as that is a basic necessity that must be available. It's very unfortunate that the water comes out so little and often shuts off. You have to report it to the receptionist downstairs, which is very tiring going up and down the stairs just to report the water issue. The receptionist's service is also lacking; they don't provide a phone number that can be contacted or the wifi password, even though it says free wifi. It seems that we have to ask first before being informed, which also makes the service lacking, because in the room itself there is an android tv facility but the wifi is not connected. So once again, if you are looking for a cheap price with an air-conditioned room and decent facilities rather than sleeping in a mosque, this hotel could be an option, but if you want comfort, this might not be the hotel for that. By the way, disclaimer: the room I booked is the cheapest type with a discount from the Agoda app and ***, another type of room might provide a different experience.
comments.originalComment: Jika mau hotel yg murah dan fasilitas lengkap maka hotel ini pilihannya, pesan lewat aplikasi lebih murah karena dapat diskon bisa dibawah ***, tapi kamar yang diberikan di lantai 3 dan tidak ada lift, air sangat minim, keluarnya sedikit-sedikit dan sering mati, kebersihan juga kurang, walaupun dengan harga segitu mgkin saya juga tidak akan menuntut lebih, kecuali air di kamar mandi sih, karena itu hal pokok yang harus ada, jadi sangat disayangkan airnya keluarnya sedikit-sedikit gitu dan sering mati, harus dilaporkan ke resepsionis di bawah yang sangat membuat capek naik turun tangga untuk perihal melaporkan air saja, karena resepsionis juga pelayanannya kurang, tidak memberikan no telp/hp yg bisa dihubungi dan juga pasword wifi, walaupun tertulis free wifi, sepertinya harus kita tanyakan dulu baru diberitahu, yg mana itu juga membuat pelayanannya kurang, karena di kamar sendiri ada fasilitas android tv tapi wifinya tidak terhubung. Jadi sekali lagi, jika anda mencari harga murah dengan kamar ber AC dan fasilitas lumayan daripada tidur di mesjid, hotel ini bisa jadi pilihan, tapi kalau mau cari kenyamanan mungkin bukan hotel ini tempatnya. Oya, disclaimer : kamar yang saya pesan ini kamar tipe termurah dengan potongan diskon dari aplikasi agoda dan ***, bisa jadi tipe kamar yg lain bisa memberikan pengalaman berbeda.

comments.reviewComments:
The cleanliness of the room is good, but not with the sheets and pillowcases that were not replaced, because the used pillowcases from previous guests are already stained from heads, and the sheets are also wrinkled, just tidied up. There are no foot mats and towels, the lights are also too dim, not bright. The AC is cold, but it drips water in the room, even though the price is already 200 thousand. For 200 thousand, it would be better to stay at Hotel Amel, where they provide a toothbrush and toothpaste, towels, a foot mat, and the room smells nice. 

For the OYO at 200 thousand with the facilities I mentioned above, it is not worth the price. I usually stay at OYO for 80 thousand and already get towels, clean sheets, and laundry-scented pillowcases. The staff is friendly and provides clear information when I ask questions, but again, for the price of over 200 thousand with the facilities I explained, I suggest it would be better to stay at Hotel Amel, Hotel Mekkah, etc.

Please improve what is lacking. I didn't dare to ask for replaced sheets yesterday because I was staying alone, fearing something might happen, so I just accepted it. I apologize if the review I gave is like this; it is not meant to defame, but it reflects my experience during my stay, as I have stayed at various hotels at different prices and received various facilities. I hope it will be better in the future. Thank you. 🙏
